title: silly string Restorer
description: Restores the silly string mechanic - Allows you to do Gravity Block Dupers like in old versions
body:
**SillyString Mod:** Restore Classic Gravity Block Duplication
The SillyString Mod is a specialized utility designed for technical Minecraft players who miss the powerful mechanics of older versions. This mod subtly alters the behavior of the End Spawn Platform to re-enable classic gravity block duper logic by protecting specific blocks from being overwritten.

**how to use:** Just replace the Obsidian Platform with String.
